The '''Gallienis system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] within the [[Portmoak sector/Legends|Portmoak sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bridin Anchorage]].
